response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings roughly 20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, which clears the 15-year tenure bar. However, the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers, and a track record of shaping cloud-AI product strategy at scale. The resume reflects solid engineering execution and recent AI-adjacent tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure), but provides no evidence of AI thought leadership, strategic advisory engagements, enterprise influence, or AI-native products built at meaningful scale. Current and historical titles remain at the Senior/Staff developer level, which is materially below the Director-equivalent seniority this position demands.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and DevOps clearly satisfies the 15-year minimum requirement
Current role at re:cinq includes direct work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, demonstrating early hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling
Founder experience with GISCollective and a consistent open-source contribution record signal entrepreneurial drive and self-directed technical initiative
concerns: No evidence of AI strategy, enterprise customer advisory, or external thought leadership — core responsibilities of this role require advising strategic partners and inspiring industry-wide adoption
AI involvement is recent and scoped to infrastructure tooling; no demonstrated AI-native products built at scale or external recognition as an AI authority
Career trajectory and titles remain at Senior/Staff individual contributor level with no signal of organizational or cross-company strategic influence expected at Director-equivalent seniority

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and thought leadership gap
Breadth and tenure of engineering experience
